title: Implement ferrum-strings: StringArray type, vectorized string operations, regex support

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Delivered: ferrum-strings fully implemented — StringArray<D> type with shape metadata, case ops (upper/lower/capitalize/title), alignment (center/ljust/rjust/zfill), stripping, find/count/startswith/endswith/replace, split/join, add with broadcasting, multiply, regex match_/extract. 77 tests passing, clippy clean.
